Classic Folklore

The Chair Kept Empty for the Night Visitor: Why Hospitality Folklore Leaves a Place at the Table

An extra chair remains at the table, not for a named guest, but for the possibility that someone might arrive after dark.

Classic Folklore - 8 min read
